attribution.changes: Statements formalized into Lean 4 by parZer; every declaration is kernel-checked under the trusted axioms (no sorryAx).
attribution.title: Evaluating the Sharpness and Limitations of Bounds on the Frobenius Number

nodes.label: thm_lem_sylvester
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_lem_sylvester :
    ∀ (a b : ℕ), 1 < a → 1 < b → Nat.Coprime a b →
      FrobeniusNumber (a * b - a - b) {a, b} := by
  intro a b ha hb hcop
  exact frobeniusNumber_pair hcop ha hb

nodes.label: thm_frob_8_32_59
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_frob_8_32_59 : FrobeniusNumber 405 {8, 32, 59} := by
  have hpair : FrobeniusNumber 405 {8, 59} := by
    have h := frobeniusNumber_pair (by decide : Nat.Coprime 8 59)
      (by norm_num : (1 : ℕ) < 8) (by norm_num : (1 : ℕ) < 59)
    norm_num at h
    exact h
  have h8 : (8 : ℕ) ∈ AddSubmonoid.closure ({8, 59} : Set ℕ) :=
    AddSubmonoid.subset_closure (by simp)
  have hcl :
      AddSubmonoid.closure ({8, 32, 59} : Set ℕ) =
        AddSubmonoid.closure ({8, 59} : Set ℕ) := by
    refine le_antisymm (AddSubmonoid.closure_le.mpr ?_) (AddSubmonoid.closure_mono ?_)
    · intro z hz
      simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hz
      rcases hz with rfl | rfl | rfl
      · exact AddSubmonoid.subset_closure (by simp)
      · rw [(by norm_num : (32 : ℕ) = 8 + 8 + 8 + 8)]
        exact add_mem (add_mem (add_mem h8 h8) h8) h8
      · exact AddSubmonoid.subset_closure (by simp)
    · intro z hz
      simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hz ⊢
      tauto
  unfold FrobeniusNumber at hpair ⊢
  simpa [hcl] using hpair

nodes.label: thm_prop_selmer_fails
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_prop_selmer_fails :
    ∃ (a b c F : ℕ),
      (0 < a ∧ a ≤ b ∧ b ≤ c) ∧
      Nat.gcd a (Nat.gcd b c) = 1 ∧
      ¬ (Nat.gcd a b = 1 ∧ Nat.gcd a c = 1 ∧ Nat.gcd b c = 1) ∧
      FrobeniusNumber F {a, b, c} ∧
      ¬ (F ≤ 2 * c * (a / 3) - a) := by
  exact ⟨8, 32, 59, 405, by decide, by decide, by decide, thm_frob_8_32_59, by decide⟩

/-! ## Algebraic helpers -/

nodes.label: thm_lem_no_subquad_n2
nodes.lean:
lemma consecutive_frob_value (n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    n * (n + 1) - n - (n + 1) = n * n - n - 1 := by
  -- n(n+1) - n - (n+1) = n² + n - n - n - 1 = n² - n - 1
  have h1 : 1 < n := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 1 < 2) hn
  have h2 : 1 < n + 1 := by omega
  have hle : n + (n + 1) ≤ n * (n + 1) := add_le_mul h1 h2
  have hle' : n + 1 + n ≤ n * (n + 1) := by
    convert hle using 1; ac_rfl
  have hle_n : n ≤ n * (n + 1) := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right n (Nat.succ_pos n)
  have hle_np : n + 1 ≤ n * (n + 1) - n := Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (by
    convert hle using 1; ac_rfl)
  have hle_nn : n ≤ n * n := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right n (by omega)
  have hle_1 : 1 ≤ n * n - n := by
    have : 1 + n ≤ n * n := by
      have := Nat.mul_le_mul_right n hn  -- 2*n ≤ n*n
      omega
    exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le this
  apply Int.ofNat.inj
  calc
    ((n * (n + 1) - n - (n + 1) : ℕ) : ℤ)
        = (n : ℤ) * (n + 1) - n - (n + 1) := by
          rw [Int.natCast_sub hle_np, Int.natCast_sub hle_n]; push_cast; ring
    _ = (n : ℤ) * n - n - 1 := by ring
    _ = ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) := by
          rw [Int.natCast_sub hle_1, Int.natCast_sub hle_nn]; push_cast; ring

lemma frobenius_consecutive (n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    FrobeniusNumber (n * n - n - 1) ({n, n + 1} : Set ℕ) := by
  have h1n : 1 < n := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 1 < 2) hn
  have h1np : 1 < n + 1 := by omega
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime n (n + 1) := Nat.coprime_self_add_right.mpr n.coprime_one_right
  have h := frobeniusNumber_pair hcop h1n h1np
  rwa [consecutive_frob_value n hn] at h

lemma cast_frob_val (n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) = (n : ℝ) * n - n - 1 := by
  have hle_nn : n ≤ n * n := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right n (by omega)
  have hle_1 : 1 ≤ n * n - n := by
    have : 1 + n ≤ n * n := by
      have := Nat.mul_le_mul_right n hn
      omega
    exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le this
  rw [Nat.cast_sub hle_1, Nat.cast_sub hle_nn, Nat.cast_mul]
  ring

lemma half_sq_le_frob (n : ℕ) (hn : 3 ≤ n) :
    ((n : ℝ) * n) / 2 ≤ ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) := by
  have hn2 : 2 ≤ n := le_trans (by decide : 2 ≤ 3) hn
  rw [cast_frob_val n hn2]
  have hnR : (3 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
  nlinarith

lemma prod_le_two_sq (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    (n : ℝ) * (n + 1) ≤ 2 * ((n : ℝ) * n) := by
  have hnR : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
  nlinarith

lemma two_sq_rpow (n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) (p : ℝ) :
    (2 * ((n : ℝ) * n)) ^ p = (2 : ℝ) ^ p * (n : ℝ) ^ (2 * p) := by
  have h2 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 := by norm_num
  have hnpos : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have hn0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := hnpos.le
  rw [mul_rpow h2 (mul_self_nonneg _), mul_rpow hn0 hn0, ← rpow_add hnpos]
  ring_nf

lemma prod_rpow_bound (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) (ε : ℝ) (hεle : 0 ≤ 1 - ε) :
    ((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε) ≤ (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (2 * (1 - ε)) := by
  have hbase : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) * (n + 1) := by
    exact mul_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (by positivity)
  have hmono := Real.rpow_le_rpow hbase (prod_le_two_sq n hn) hεle
  exact hmono.trans (le_of_eq (two_sq_rpow n (lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 0 < 1) hn) (1 - ε)))

lemma tendsto_nat_neg_rpow (ε : ℝ) (hε : 0 < ε) :
    Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε))) atTop (nhds 0) :=
  (tendsto_rpow_neg_atTop (mul_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 2) hε)).comp
    tendsto_natCast_atTop_atTop

lemma exists_large_neg_rpow (ε : ℝ) (hε : 0 < ε) (K : ℝ) (hK : 0 < K) :
    ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ n : ℕ, N ≤ n → (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε)) < K :=
  eventually_atTop.1 ((tendsto_nat_neg_rpow ε hε).eventually (gt_mem_nhds hK))

lemma rpow_two_mul_neg (n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) (ε : ℝ) :
    (n : ℝ) ^ (2 * (1 - ε)) = ((n : ℝ) * n) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε)) := by
  have hnpos : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have heq : 2 * (1 - ε) = (2 : ℝ) + (-(2 * ε)) := by ring
  rw [heq, rpow_add hnpos, rpow_two, pow_two]

lemma cancel_half_sq (n C t : ℝ) (hn : 0 < n) (h : (n * n) / 2 ≤ C * (n * n * t)) :
    (1 : ℝ) / 2 ≤ C * t := by
  have hn2 : 0 < n * n := mul_pos hn hn
  have h' : (n * n) / 2 ≤ (C * t) * (n * n) := by convert h using 1; ring
  calc
    (1 : ℝ) / 2 = ((n * n) / 2) / (n * n) := by field_simp
    _ ≤ ((C * t) * (n * n)) / (n * n) := div_le_div_of_nonneg_right h' hn2.le
    _ = C * t := by field_simp [ne_of_gt hn2]

/-! ## Core contradiction for the consecutive family -/

/-- Explicit inequality we will violate. -/

def boundHolds (C ε : ℝ) (n : ℕ) : Prop :=
  ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) ≤ C * (((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε))

lemma consecutive_violates (C ε : ℝ) (hC : 0 < C) (hε : 0 < ε) :
    ∃ n : ℕ, 3 ≤ n ∧ ¬ boundHolds C ε n := by
  by_cases hExp : 0 ≤ 1 - ε
  · -- 0 < ε ≤ 1
    have h2pos : 0 < (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) := Real.rpow_pos_of_pos (by norm_num) _
    have hKpos : 0 < (1 : ℝ) / 2 / (C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε)) := by positivity
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := exists_large_neg_rpow ε hε _ hKpos
    let n : ℕ := max N 3
    refine ⟨n, le_max_right N 3, ?_⟩
    intro hle
    have hnN : N ≤ n := le_max_left N 3
    have hn3 : 3 ≤ n := le_max_right N 3
    have hn2 : 2 ≤ n := le_trans (by decide : 2 ≤ 3) hn3
    have hn1 : 1 ≤ n := le_trans (by decide : 1 ≤ 2) hn2
    have hL := half_sq_le_frob n hn3
    have hRbound := prod_rpow_bound n hn1 ε hExp
    unfold boundHolds at hle
    have hR : ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) ≤
        C * ((2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (2 * (1 - ε))) :=
      hle.trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hRbound hC.le)
    have hmain : ((n : ℝ) * n) / 2 ≤
        C * ((2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (2 * (1 - ε))) := hL.trans hR
    have hnpos : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 0 < 3) hn3)
    rw [rpow_two_mul_neg n (by exact_mod_cast hnpos) ε] at hmain
    have hdiv : (1 : ℝ) / 2 ≤ C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε)) := by
      have h' : ((n : ℝ) * n) / 2 ≤
          (C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε))) * ((n : ℝ) * n) := by
        convert hmain using 1; ring
      exact cancel_half_sq (n : ℝ) (C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε)) ((n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε)))
        hnpos (by convert h' using 1; ring)
    have hsmall := hN n hnN
    have hC2 : 0 < C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) := mul_pos hC h2pos
    have hlt : C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε)) < (1 : ℝ) / 2 := by
      have := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hsmall hC2
      convert this using 1
      field_simp [ne_of_gt hC2]
    linarith
  · -- ε > 1
    have hα : 0 < ε - 1 := by linarith [lt_of_not_ge hExp]
    have hprod : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => (n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) atTop atTop := by
      refine tendsto_atTop_mono (fun n : ℕ => ?_) tendsto_natCast_atTop_atTop
      cases n with
      | zero => simp
      | succ n =>
        exact_mod_cast (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right n.succ (Nat.succ_pos _))
    have hpow : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => x ^ (-(ε - 1))) atTop (nhds 0) :=
      tendsto_rpow_neg_atTop hα
    have htend : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => ((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε)) atTop (nhds 0) := by
      have hfun : (fun n : ℕ => ((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε)) =
          (fun n : ℕ => ((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (-(ε - 1))) := by
        funext n; congr 1; ring
      rw [hfun]
      exact hpow.comp hprod
    have hK : 0 < (1 : ℝ) / (2 * C) := by positivity
    obtain ⟨N₀, hN₀⟩ := eventually_atTop.1 (htend.eventually (gt_mem_nhds hK))
    let n : ℕ := max N₀ 3
    refine ⟨n, le_max_right N₀ 3, ?_⟩
    intro hle
    have hn3 : 3 ≤ n := le_max_right N₀ 3
    have hL := half_sq_le_frob n hn3
    have hFge : (1 : ℝ) ≤ ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) := by
      have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ ((n : ℝ) * n) / 2 := by
        have hnR : (3 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn3
        nlinarith
      exact this.trans hL
    have hsmall : ((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε) < 1 / (2 * C) := hN₀ n (le_max_left N₀ 3)
    have hR : C * (((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε)) < (1 : ℝ) / 2 := by
      have := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hsmall hC
      convert this using 1
      field_simp [ne_of_gt hC]
    unfold boundHolds at hle
    linarith

/-! ## Class (b) — 2-generator lemma -/

def padPair (k n : ℕ) : Fin (k + 2) → ℕ := fun i =>
  if (i : ℕ) = k + 1 then n + 1 else n

lemma padPair_zero (k n : ℕ) : padPair k n 0 = n := by
  simp [padPair]

lemma padPair_last (k n : ℕ) : padPair k n (Fin.last (k + 1)) = n + 1 := by
  simp [padPair, Fin.val_last]

lemma padPair_monotone (k n : ℕ) : Monotone (padPair k n) := by
  intro i j hij
  simp only [padPair]
  split_ifs with hi hj
  · exact le_rfl
  · have : (i : ℕ) ≤ (j : ℕ) := hij
    have : (j : ℕ) < k + 2 := j.isLt
    omega
  · exact Nat.le_succ n
  · exact le_rfl

lemma padPair_pos (k n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) : ∀ i, 0 < padPair k n i := by
  intro i; simp only [padPair]; split_ifs <;> omega

lemma padPair_gcd (k n : ℕ) : Finset.univ.gcd (padPair k n) = 1 := by
  let g := Finset.univ.gcd (padPair k n)
  have d0 : g ∣ padPair k n 0 := Finset.gcd_dvd (Finset.mem_univ (0 : Fin (k + 2)))
  have dL : g ∣ padPair k n (Fin.last (k + 1)) :=
    Finset.gcd_dvd (Finset.mem_univ (Fin.last (k + 1)))
  rw [padPair_zero k n] at d0
  rw [padPair_last k n] at dL
  have h1 : g ∣ 1 := by
    have : g ∣ (n + 1) - n := Nat.dvd_sub dL d0
    simpa using this
  exact Nat.dvd_one.mp h1

lemma padPair_range (k n : ℕ) :
    Set.range (padPair k n) = ({n, n + 1} : Set ℕ) := by
  ext x
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨i, rfl⟩
    simp only [padPair, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    split_ifs <;> simp
  · intro hx
    simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
    rcases hx with h | h
    · refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      simp [padPair_zero, h]
    · refine ⟨Fin.last (k + 1), ?_⟩
      simp [padPair_last, h]

lemma frobenius_pad (k n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    FrobeniusNumber (n * n - n - 1) (Set.range (padPair k n)) := by
  simpa [padPair_range k n] using frobenius_consecutive n hn

/-! ## Class (b) — general dimension theorem -/

theorem thm_lem_no_subquad_n2 :
    ∀ (ε : ℝ), 0 < ε →
      ¬ ∃ (C : ℝ), 0 < C ∧
        ∀ (a b F : ℕ), 0 < a → a ≤ b → Nat.Coprime a b →
          FrobeniusNumber F {a, b} →
          (F : ℝ) ≤ C * ((a : ℝ) * (b : ℝ)) ^ (1 - ε) := by
  intro ε hε ⟨C, hC, hBound⟩
  obtain ⟨n, hn3, hviol⟩ := consecutive_violates C ε hC hε
  have hn2 : 2 ≤ n := le_trans (by decide : 2 ≤ 3) hn3
  have hF := frobenius_consecutive n hn2
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime n (n + 1) := Nat.coprime_self_add_right.mpr n.coprime_one_right
  have happl := hBound n (n + 1) (n * n - n - 1)
    (lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 0 < 3) hn3) (Nat.le_succ n) hcop hF
  exact hviol (by simpa [boundHolds] using happl)

/-! ## Padding for higher arity -/

nodes.label: thm_thm_no_subquad
nodes.lean:
lemma consecutive_frob_value (n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    n * (n + 1) - n - (n + 1) = n * n - n - 1 := by
  -- n(n+1) - n - (n+1) = n² + n - n - n - 1 = n² - n - 1
  have h1 : 1 < n := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 1 < 2) hn
  have h2 : 1 < n + 1 := by omega
  have hle : n + (n + 1) ≤ n * (n + 1) := add_le_mul h1 h2
  have hle' : n + 1 + n ≤ n * (n + 1) := by
    convert hle using 1; ac_rfl
  have hle_n : n ≤ n * (n + 1) := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right n (Nat.succ_pos n)
  have hle_np : n + 1 ≤ n * (n + 1) - n := Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (by
    convert hle using 1; ac_rfl)
  have hle_nn : n ≤ n * n := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right n (by omega)
  have hle_1 : 1 ≤ n * n - n := by
    have : 1 + n ≤ n * n := by
      have := Nat.mul_le_mul_right n hn  -- 2*n ≤ n*n
      omega
    exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le this
  apply Int.ofNat.inj
  calc
    ((n * (n + 1) - n - (n + 1) : ℕ) : ℤ)
        = (n : ℤ) * (n + 1) - n - (n + 1) := by
          rw [Int.natCast_sub hle_np, Int.natCast_sub hle_n]; push_cast; ring
    _ = (n : ℤ) * n - n - 1 := by ring
    _ = ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℤ) := by
          rw [Int.natCast_sub hle_1, Int.natCast_sub hle_nn]; push_cast; ring

lemma frobenius_consecutive (n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    FrobeniusNumber (n * n - n - 1) ({n, n + 1} : Set ℕ) := by
  have h1n : 1 < n := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 1 < 2) hn
  have h1np : 1 < n + 1 := by omega
  have hcop : Nat.Coprime n (n + 1) := Nat.coprime_self_add_right.mpr n.coprime_one_right
  have h := frobeniusNumber_pair hcop h1n h1np
  rwa [consecutive_frob_value n hn] at h

lemma cast_frob_val (n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) = (n : ℝ) * n - n - 1 := by
  have hle_nn : n ≤ n * n := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right n (by omega)
  have hle_1 : 1 ≤ n * n - n := by
    have : 1 + n ≤ n * n := by
      have := Nat.mul_le_mul_right n hn
      omega
    exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le this
  rw [Nat.cast_sub hle_1, Nat.cast_sub hle_nn, Nat.cast_mul]
  ring

lemma half_sq_le_frob (n : ℕ) (hn : 3 ≤ n) :
    ((n : ℝ) * n) / 2 ≤ ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) := by
  have hn2 : 2 ≤ n := le_trans (by decide : 2 ≤ 3) hn
  rw [cast_frob_val n hn2]
  have hnR : (3 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
  nlinarith

lemma prod_le_two_sq (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    (n : ℝ) * (n + 1) ≤ 2 * ((n : ℝ) * n) := by
  have hnR : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
  nlinarith

lemma two_sq_rpow (n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) (p : ℝ) :
    (2 * ((n : ℝ) * n)) ^ p = (2 : ℝ) ^ p * (n : ℝ) ^ (2 * p) := by
  have h2 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2 := by norm_num
  have hnpos : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have hn0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := hnpos.le
  rw [mul_rpow h2 (mul_self_nonneg _), mul_rpow hn0 hn0, ← rpow_add hnpos]
  ring_nf

lemma prod_rpow_bound (n : ℕ) (hn : 1 ≤ n) (ε : ℝ) (hεle : 0 ≤ 1 - ε) :
    ((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε) ≤ (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (2 * (1 - ε)) := by
  have hbase : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) * (n + 1) := by
    exact mul_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (by positivity)
  have hmono := Real.rpow_le_rpow hbase (prod_le_two_sq n hn) hεle
  exact hmono.trans (le_of_eq (two_sq_rpow n (lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 0 < 1) hn) (1 - ε)))

lemma tendsto_nat_neg_rpow (ε : ℝ) (hε : 0 < ε) :
    Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε))) atTop (nhds 0) :=
  (tendsto_rpow_neg_atTop (mul_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 2) hε)).comp
    tendsto_natCast_atTop_atTop

lemma exists_large_neg_rpow (ε : ℝ) (hε : 0 < ε) (K : ℝ) (hK : 0 < K) :
    ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ n : ℕ, N ≤ n → (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε)) < K :=
  eventually_atTop.1 ((tendsto_nat_neg_rpow ε hε).eventually (gt_mem_nhds hK))

lemma rpow_two_mul_neg (n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) (ε : ℝ) :
    (n : ℝ) ^ (2 * (1 - ε)) = ((n : ℝ) * n) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε)) := by
  have hnpos : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have heq : 2 * (1 - ε) = (2 : ℝ) + (-(2 * ε)) := by ring
  rw [heq, rpow_add hnpos, rpow_two, pow_two]

lemma cancel_half_sq (n C t : ℝ) (hn : 0 < n) (h : (n * n) / 2 ≤ C * (n * n * t)) :
    (1 : ℝ) / 2 ≤ C * t := by
  have hn2 : 0 < n * n := mul_pos hn hn
  have h' : (n * n) / 2 ≤ (C * t) * (n * n) := by convert h using 1; ring
  calc
    (1 : ℝ) / 2 = ((n * n) / 2) / (n * n) := by field_simp
    _ ≤ ((C * t) * (n * n)) / (n * n) := div_le_div_of_nonneg_right h' hn2.le
    _ = C * t := by field_simp [ne_of_gt hn2]

/-! ## Core contradiction for the consecutive family -/

/-- Explicit inequality we will violate. -/

def boundHolds (C ε : ℝ) (n : ℕ) : Prop :=
  ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) ≤ C * (((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε))

lemma consecutive_violates (C ε : ℝ) (hC : 0 < C) (hε : 0 < ε) :
    ∃ n : ℕ, 3 ≤ n ∧ ¬ boundHolds C ε n := by
  by_cases hExp : 0 ≤ 1 - ε
  · -- 0 < ε ≤ 1
    have h2pos : 0 < (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) := Real.rpow_pos_of_pos (by norm_num) _
    have hKpos : 0 < (1 : ℝ) / 2 / (C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε)) := by positivity
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := exists_large_neg_rpow ε hε _ hKpos
    let n : ℕ := max N 3
    refine ⟨n, le_max_right N 3, ?_⟩
    intro hle
    have hnN : N ≤ n := le_max_left N 3
    have hn3 : 3 ≤ n := le_max_right N 3
    have hn2 : 2 ≤ n := le_trans (by decide : 2 ≤ 3) hn3
    have hn1 : 1 ≤ n := le_trans (by decide : 1 ≤ 2) hn2
    have hL := half_sq_le_frob n hn3
    have hRbound := prod_rpow_bound n hn1 ε hExp
    unfold boundHolds at hle
    have hR : ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) ≤
        C * ((2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (2 * (1 - ε))) :=
      hle.trans (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hRbound hC.le)
    have hmain : ((n : ℝ) * n) / 2 ≤
        C * ((2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (2 * (1 - ε))) := hL.trans hR
    have hnpos : (0 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 0 < 3) hn3)
    rw [rpow_two_mul_neg n (by exact_mod_cast hnpos) ε] at hmain
    have hdiv : (1 : ℝ) / 2 ≤ C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε)) := by
      have h' : ((n : ℝ) * n) / 2 ≤
          (C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε))) * ((n : ℝ) * n) := by
        convert hmain using 1; ring
      exact cancel_half_sq (n : ℝ) (C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε)) ((n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε)))
        hnpos (by convert h' using 1; ring)
    have hsmall := hN n hnN
    have hC2 : 0 < C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) := mul_pos hC h2pos
    have hlt : C * (2 : ℝ) ^ (1 - ε) * (n : ℝ) ^ (-(2 * ε)) < (1 : ℝ) / 2 := by
      have := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hsmall hC2
      convert this using 1
      field_simp [ne_of_gt hC2]
    linarith
  · -- ε > 1
    have hα : 0 < ε - 1 := by linarith [lt_of_not_ge hExp]
    have hprod : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => (n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) atTop atTop := by
      refine tendsto_atTop_mono (fun n : ℕ => ?_) tendsto_natCast_atTop_atTop
      cases n with
      | zero => simp
      | succ n =>
        exact_mod_cast (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right n.succ (Nat.succ_pos _))
    have hpow : Tendsto (fun x : ℝ => x ^ (-(ε - 1))) atTop (nhds 0) :=
      tendsto_rpow_neg_atTop hα
    have htend : Tendsto (fun n : ℕ => ((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε)) atTop (nhds 0) := by
      have hfun : (fun n : ℕ => ((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε)) =
          (fun n : ℕ => ((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (-(ε - 1))) := by
        funext n; congr 1; ring
      rw [hfun]
      exact hpow.comp hprod
    have hK : 0 < (1 : ℝ) / (2 * C) := by positivity
    obtain ⟨N₀, hN₀⟩ := eventually_atTop.1 (htend.eventually (gt_mem_nhds hK))
    let n : ℕ := max N₀ 3
    refine ⟨n, le_max_right N₀ 3, ?_⟩
    intro hle
    have hn3 : 3 ≤ n := le_max_right N₀ 3
    have hL := half_sq_le_frob n hn3
    have hFge : (1 : ℝ) ≤ ((n * n - n - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) := by
      have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ ((n : ℝ) * n) / 2 := by
        have hnR : (3 : ℝ) ≤ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn3
        nlinarith
      exact this.trans hL
    have hsmall : ((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε) < 1 / (2 * C) := hN₀ n (le_max_left N₀ 3)
    have hR : C * (((n : ℝ) * (n + 1)) ^ (1 - ε)) < (1 : ℝ) / 2 := by
      have := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hsmall hC
      convert this using 1
      field_simp [ne_of_gt hC]
    unfold boundHolds at hle
    linarith

/-! ## Class (b) — 2-generator lemma -/

def padPair (k n : ℕ) : Fin (k + 2) → ℕ := fun i =>
  if (i : ℕ) = k + 1 then n + 1 else n

lemma padPair_zero (k n : ℕ) : padPair k n 0 = n := by
  simp [padPair]

lemma padPair_last (k n : ℕ) : padPair k n (Fin.last (k + 1)) = n + 1 := by
  simp [padPair, Fin.val_last]

lemma padPair_monotone (k n : ℕ) : Monotone (padPair k n) := by
  intro i j hij
  simp only [padPair]
  split_ifs with hi hj
  · exact le_rfl
  · have : (i : ℕ) ≤ (j : ℕ) := hij
    have : (j : ℕ) < k + 2 := j.isLt
    omega
  · exact Nat.le_succ n
  · exact le_rfl

lemma padPair_pos (k n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) : ∀ i, 0 < padPair k n i := by
  intro i; simp only [padPair]; split_ifs <;> omega

lemma padPair_gcd (k n : ℕ) : Finset.univ.gcd (padPair k n) = 1 := by
  let g := Finset.univ.gcd (padPair k n)
  have d0 : g ∣ padPair k n 0 := Finset.gcd_dvd (Finset.mem_univ (0 : Fin (k + 2)))
  have dL : g ∣ padPair k n (Fin.last (k + 1)) :=
    Finset.gcd_dvd (Finset.mem_univ (Fin.last (k + 1)))
  rw [padPair_zero k n] at d0
  rw [padPair_last k n] at dL
  have h1 : g ∣ 1 := by
    have : g ∣ (n + 1) - n := Nat.dvd_sub dL d0
    simpa using this
  exact Nat.dvd_one.mp h1

lemma padPair_range (k n : ℕ) :
    Set.range (padPair k n) = ({n, n + 1} : Set ℕ) := by
  ext x
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨i, rfl⟩
    simp only [padPair, Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    split_ifs <;> simp
  · intro hx
    simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
    rcases hx with h | h
    · refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      simp [padPair_zero, h]
    · refine ⟨Fin.last (k + 1), ?_⟩
      simp [padPair_last, h]

lemma frobenius_pad (k n : ℕ) (hn : 2 ≤ n) :
    FrobeniusNumber (n * n - n - 1) (Set.range (padPair k n)) := by
  simpa [padPair_range k n] using frobenius_consecutive n hn

/-! ## Class (b) — general dimension theorem -/

theorem thm_thm_no_subquad :
    ∀ (m : ℕ), ∀ (ε : ℝ), 0 < ε →
      ¬ ∃ (C : ℝ), 0 < C ∧
        ∀ (a : Fin (m + 2) → ℕ) (F : ℕ),
          (∀ i, 0 < a i) → Monotone a → Finset.univ.gcd a = 1 →
          FrobeniusNumber F (Set.range a) →
          (F : ℝ) ≤ C * ((a 0 : ℝ) * (a (Fin.last (m + 1)) : ℝ)) ^ (1 - ε) := by
  intro m ε hε ⟨C, hC, hBound⟩
  obtain ⟨n, hn3, hviol⟩ := consecutive_violates C ε hC hε
  have hn2 : 2 ≤ n := le_trans (by decide : 2 ≤ 3) hn3
  let a := padPair m n
  have happl := hBound a (n * n - n - 1)
    (padPair_pos m n (lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 0 < 3) hn3))
    (padPair_monotone m n)
    (padPair_gcd m n)
    (frobenius_pad m n hn2)
  have h0 : a 0 = n := padPair_zero m n
  have hL : a (Fin.last (m + 1)) = n + 1 := padPair_last m n
  rw [h0, hL] at happl
  exact hviol (by simpa [boundHolds] using happl)

title: Evaluating the Sharpness and Limitations of Bounds on the Frobenius Number

stages.label: Stage 1 — base results
stages.blurb: Pair formula, concrete witness, and the Selmer-type counterexample — each closed under the trusted axioms.

stages.label: Stage 2 — asymptotic limits
stages.blurb: No uniform sub-(a₁·aₙ) bound in two generators, then the same obstruction in every higher arity.
